nasb.text: chief Magdiel, chief Iram. These are the chiefs of Edom (that is, Esau, the father of the Edomites), according to their habitations in the land of their possession.

esv.text: Magdiel, and Iram; these are the chiefs of Edom (that is, Esau, the father of Edom), according to their dwelling places in the land of their possession.

cnv.text: 瑪基疊族長和以蘭族長。這些都是以東人的族長，在所得作為產業的地上，按著他們的住處作族長。以東的始祖就是以掃。

ccb.text: 玛基叠、以兰。这些人在所住的以东各地做族长。以扫是以东人的始祖。

csbs.text: 玛基叠族长、以兰族长。 以上是以东的各族长，在他们得为业的居住之地作族长； 以东人的始祖就是这以扫。
